name: lapukhou-rags
description: Local RAG knowledge-base plugins — each plugin is an Obsidian wiki vault with hybrid retrieval (BM25 + rerank)

plugins.name: rag-jtbd
plugins.description: Jobs-to-be-Done knowledge base: Anthony Ulwick's 'Jobs to Be Done: Theory to Practice' (2016) — JTBD theory, ODI process, case studies.

plugins.name: rag-octalysis
plugins.description: Octalysis gamification knowledge base: Yu-kai Chou's 'Actionable Gamification' — 8 Core Drives, game techniques, White Hat vs Black Hat design, case studies.
